query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM projects WHERE status IN ('contacto_inicial', 'visita_medidas', 'pendiente_cliente', 'instalacion_programada') GROUP BY status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM projects WHERE status IN ('contacto_inicial', 'visita_medidas', 'pendiente_cliente', 'instalacion_programada') GROUP BY status;
